title: Arkanian heavy pistol

The '''Arkanian heavy pistol''' was a type of [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]] manufactured by the [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanians]] at some point around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5956 BBY]], which was before heavy [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]] became popular. Roughly [[3956 BBY|two thousand years]] later, during the [[Jedi Civil War]] and [[Dark Wars]] fought between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], the weapons were still superior to many newer designs. However, the Arkanian heavy pistols were incompatible with new weapon modifications at that point. During that [[Time/Legends|time]], the weapons were marketed for sale on [[Planet/Legends|planets]] such as [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] and [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].

==Description==
Despite the age of the design, the [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy pistol]] was still more powerful and accurate than many later heavy [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] designs. Like other heavy [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] pistols, it could be fired using one [[Limb/Legends|hand]] by [[Species/Legends|species]] that were roughly the same size and build as [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. The weapon had a [[Color/Legends|gold-colored]] finish, fired red blaster [[Laser/Legends|bolts]], and was similar in appearance to other heavy blaster pistol designs around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]<ref name="kotor" /> and the [[Dark Wars]],<ref name="kotorcg">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> fought between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]].<ref name="kotor2" /> It also had an effective range of twenty-three [[Meter/Legends|meters]],<ref name="kotor" /> which was comparable to other heavy blaster pistol designs used around the same time.<ref name="kotor2range">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' both had a generic [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]] with a range of twenty-three [[Meter/Legends|meters]].</ref> By the time of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Civil War<ref name="kotor" /> and the Dark Wars,<ref name="kotorcg" /> the Arkanian heavy pistol was incompatible with the upgrades of that time for its [[Scope/Legends|scope]], [[firing chamber]], or [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]].<ref name="kotor2" />

==History==
Around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5956 BBY]],<ref name="productiondate" /> the Arkanian heavy blaster was developed by members of the Arkanian species. At that point, heavy blaster pistols were not a widely accepted weapon of choice, but by the time of the later Jedi Civil War<ref name="kotor" /> in [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="kotorcg" /> heavy blaster pistols were a much more widely used design. Despite the passage of time, the Arkanian design was still superior to most others in use at the time of the conflict between the Republic and the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Empire.<ref name="kotorcg" />

Shortly before the [[Destruction of Taris|bombardment]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] by [[Darth Malak]], the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] who led the Sith Empire, [[Igear]], a Human [[Outcasts (Taris)|Outcast]] descended from individuals [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exiled]] to live in the planet's [[Undercity (Taris)|Undercity]], was selling one of the pistols for 750 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in a [[Outcast village|village]] where the Outcasts lived. Later during the same year, a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] named [[Tyvark Luowan]] had an Arkanian heavy pistol up for sale at 1,000 credits in his [[Tyvark Luowan's Rodian Surprises|general store]] in [[Ahto City]] on the planet [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]].<ref name="kotor2" /> In [[3951 BBY]], during the Dark Wars fought between the Republic and the remnants of the Sith Empire,<ref name="kotorcg" /> the pistol still sometimes sold at prices of around 1,300 credits.<ref name="kotor2" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Arkanian heavy pistol made its first appearance in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', a [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] by [[BioWare]]. In the game, the weapon was sold by Igear in the Taris Undercity and by Tyvark Luowan in his general store in Ahto City on Manaan.<ref name="kotor" /> The pistol later appeared in [[Obsidian Entertainment]]'s [[2004]] sequel to the first game, ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''. In ''The Sith Lords'', the weapon could be found in randomly determined locations throughout the game, which meant that the player was not guaranteed to find the pistol during every play through the game.<ref name="kotor2" />

Between the two games, the attributes of the Arkanian heavy pistol remained largely the same; both games made the weapon slightly more powerful and accurate than a standard heavy blaster pistol. In addition, neither game allowed the weapon to receive upgrades.<ref name="kotor" /><ref name="kotor2" /> Although both games mention that the weapon was created 2,000 years before the events of the game, and the two games take place five years apart, this article uses 5956 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] as an approximate date for the creation of the weapon.<ref name="productiondate" />

==Appearances==

*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
